input_text: The children playing in the garden laughed. Bike's length is 10 kilometers. Tallinn is in Estonia. The blue car costs two dollars. Mark is not in the box. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Estonia is not outside Europe. A big bear was strong. The cake baked by John was sweet. The road leading to the village was narrow. Emily is a wolf. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Earth contains Europe. Sandra went back to the bathroom. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. The teacher showed the students a map. Estonia contains Tartu. The head of Mary is clean. Mike or Mickey are not female. Riga is not in Estonia. Tom opened the door and the window. Riga is in Estonia?
